data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of historical trends of pass/fail/remediation over time.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a historical trend of pass/fail/remediation over time. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or data that explicitly demonstrate this historical trend, leading to an inconclusive result. The prior steps indicate various passed validations, but none address the specific requirement of tracking historical trends, resulting in a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: Lack of evidence records showing historical trends of pass/fail/remediation over time.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add historical trend tracking mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the historical trends of pass/fail/remediation.
